case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. DERRICK M WALLS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,801.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT WALLS, DERRICK M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.50 - SERVED AUG-27-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALLS, DERRICK M

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLS, DERRICK M $2,361.50 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,422.00, THE DEFENDANT'S ACTS CONSTITUTE FRAUDULENT CONDUCT UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTIONS 1572, 1709 AND 1710, BASED ON THE FINDINGS OF AN INTENTIONAL PROGRAM VIOLATION AT THE ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WALLS, DERRICK M
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT WALLS, DERRICK M
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-23-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
